title: Creamy Indian Chestnut Curry
description: A rich and flavorful curry made with roasted chestnuts, fragrant spices, and a creamy sauce. Perfect for a comforting dinner.

ingredients.name: fragrant oil
ingredients.notes: such as coconut or canola oil

instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the curry powder and cumin powder, and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chestnuts and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to brown.
Add the coconut milk and water, and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chestnuts are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
